case_title: RAYMOND OWYANG VS. DAVID KWONG et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWYANG, RAYMOND AS TO DEFENDANT KWONG, DAVID
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KWONG, DAVID
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KWONG, DAVID

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OWYANG, RAYMOND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KWONG, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 301-1/2 COLUMBUS AVE.,RM 215, SAN FRANCISCO CA (COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO), LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWYANG, RAYMOND AS TO DEFENDANT KWONG, DAVID DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWYANG, RAYMOND SERVED MAY-16-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KWONG, DAVID
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.44 FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWYANG, RAYMOND
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KWONG, DAVID
